prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次分别为2930→2708→2332→2401名，整体呈波动中前移趋势，2024年达到近年最高（2332名），2025年小幅后移至2401名，近两年波动幅度约6 9名，2025年基准位次约2401名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划2022–2025年均为19人，2026年增至23人，较2025年扩招约21%，扩招幅度较大，理 论上会降低录取门槛，使最低位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第65位持续上升至2026年第52位，排名稳步提 升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2023年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学校管理事件），但2026年声誉数据中未见江南大学相关负面信号；抖音 热度排名第71位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等，未出现明显热度推高或负面舆情；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A+，均为全国顶尖水平；食品 科学与工程为该校王牌专业，在招生计划中持续设置，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业涵盖计算机科学与技术、自动化、微电子科学与工 程等热门工科专业，以及食品科学与工程、酿酒工程等特色专业；宁夏2026年物理类考生约44550人（按历史比例估算），较2025年44491人微增约59人，竞争略有加剧；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对宁夏考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在宁夏招生计划占比较小，扩招后仍仅23人，对整 体录取格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2401名、2026年扩招21%（理论上推低位次约303名至2704名）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力，部分抵消扩招效应 ）、考生规模微增（竞争略加剧）等因素，预测2026年最低位次约2674名，较2025年后移约273名，区间2193–3155名。扩招是位次后移的主 导因素，学校层次提升和考生微增则起到一定的反向调节作用。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化
- 微电子科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 食品科学与工程
- 信息与计算科学
- 机械工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子封装技术
- 高分子材料与工程
- 酿酒工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2193–3155名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（食品科学与工程为A+王牌、信息与计算科学和机械工程就业稳定），一档专业（计算机、自动化、微电子）可 作为冲刺选择，三档专业（电子封装、高分子、酿酒工程）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（约2200名以内）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（约3100名以外）建 议以二档和三档为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 2930 → 2708 → 2332 → 2401, showing a fluctuating forward trend, reaching the highest in 2024 (2332), and slightly moving back to 2401 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 69 positions in the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2401. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science/physics category was 19 students from 2022 to 2025, increasing to 23 students in 2026, an expansion of about 21% compared to 2025, which theoretically lowers the admission threshold, increasing the minimum ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation was slightly negative (involving school management incidents), but no negative signals related to Jiangnan University were found in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, without significant popularity surges or negative public opinion; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, both at the national top level; Food Science and Engineering is the university's flagship major, consistently offered in the enrollment plan, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors include popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Automation, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, as well as distinctive majors like Food Science and Engineering and Brewing Engineering; Ningxia's 2026 physics category candidates are about 44,550 (estimated by historical proportion), a slight increase of about 59 from 44,491 in 2025, intensifying competition slightly; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, offering some regional appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia is relatively small, even after expansion, only 23 students, with limited impact on the overall admission landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2401, the 2026 expansion of 21% (theoretically pushing the ranking back by about 303 to 2704), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness, partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the slight increase in candidate numbers (slightly intensifying competition), the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 2674, moving back about 273 positions from 2025, with a range of 2193–3155. Expansion is the dominant factor for the ranking shift, while the university's level improvement and slight candidate increase play a moderating role in the opposite direction.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Information and Computing Science
- Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Electronic Packaging Technology
- Polymer Materials and Engineering
- Brewing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 2193–3155, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Food Science and Engineering is an A+ flagship, Information and Computing Science and Mechanical Engineering have stable employment), Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Microelectronics) can be chosen as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Electronic Packaging, Polymer Materials, Brewing Engineering) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within about 2200), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside about 3100), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
